name: Low-Fat Cream Cheese Tube Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Rum OR brandy OR cognac
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Coat a 10-inch tube or bundt pan with non-stick vegetable spray and set aside.
2. Sift together the cake flour, baking powder, and baking soda; set aside.
3. Beat the cream cheese and margarine in a large bowl until well blended. Add the sugar and beat until light, about 2 minutes. Beat in the egg substitute, egg whites, buttermilk, vanilla extract, lemon zest, and liquor; mix well. Gradually add the flour mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 75 to 80 minutes. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to finish cooling. Dust with confectioners' sugar while still warm.
Per serving: 260 calories, 8 g fat, 4 mg cholesterol, 395 mg sodium, 38 g carbohydrates, 7 g protein
Source: Chicago Tribune, November 6, 1996
